title: The Proposal
overview: When all the hard but crookedly planned attempts to succeed in life hilariously fails, Davis ventures to arranged marriage plan with one tag line - "no dowry asked but get me a visa to settle in Australia". When Davis meets Sandra through a matrimonial website, his story takes a turn.
